# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  webAppName:
    type: string
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24
    metadata:
      description: Storage account name must be between 3 and 24 characters in length

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01
  name: [parameters('webAppName')]-AppServicePlan
  location: [resourceGroup().location]
  sku:
    tier: 'B1'
    name: 'B1'
  properties:
    reserved: false

- type: Microsoft.Web/sites
  apiVersion: 2021-02-01
  name: [parameters('webAppName')]
  location: [resourceGroup().location]
  dependsOn:
  - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('webAppName') + '-AppServicePlan')]"
  properties:
    serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('webAppName') + '-AppServicePlan')]"

- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
  apiVersion: 2017-10-01-preview
  name: [parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]
  location: [resourceGroup().location]
  properties:
    administratorLogin: adminuser
    administratorLoginPassword: '[parameters("sqlAdministratorPassword")]'

- type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
  apiVersion: 2017-10-01-preview
  name: "[concat(parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
  location: [resourceGroup().location]
  dependsOn:
  - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"

- type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
  apiVersion: 2019-06-01
  name: [parameters('storageAccountName')]
  location: [resourceGroup().location]
  kind: StorageV2
  sku:
    name: Standard_LRS
